en: He just laughed.
So how's the drumming going, Andy?
ko: 드럼 연습은 어떻게 되고 있어, 앤디?

en: Oh, yeah, it's going really well.
I'm the new core drummer, so...
Hey!
Come, Brady!
Did you hear it yet? No, what happened? Drive got named this year's MVP.
ko: 들었어? 아니, 무슨 일이야? 드라이브가 올해의 MVP로 선정됐어.

en: That's fantastic, Travis!
And Dustin is heading up Model UN,
ko: 그리고 더스틴이 모델 유엔을 이끌고 있어,

en: soon to be Road Scholar,
and who knows what all else.
ko: 또 어떤 일이 있을지 누가 알아.

en: And Jim, Teacher of the Year.
I mean, come on,
the talent at this table, that is stunning.
And Andy,
with your drumming.
It's going okay, Andy?
Yeah, I mean, it's going really, really well, actually.
ko: 응, 사실 정말 잘 되고 있어.

en: I'm part of Schaefer's Top Jazz Orchestra,
ko: 나는 쉐이퍼의 최고 재즈 오케스트라의 일원이고,

en: which means it's the best in the country,
and I'm a core member,
so I'll start playing in competitions,
and actually, I just found out
ko: 그리고 사실, 나는 방금 알게 됐어.

en: I'm the youngest person in the entire band.
ko: 내가 전체 밴드에서 가장 어린 사람이란 걸.

en: How do you know who wins in a music competition?
ko: 음악 대회에서 누가 이기는지 어떻게 알아?

en: Isn't it subjective?
No.
Does the studio get you a job?
No, it's not an actual studio.
